character.bio: A monk and yoga master from India who has served as a guide for countless suffering souls. Prefers to avoid conflict when possible, but his innate hatred of evil compels him to dispense stern justice.

dhalsim_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter

dhalsim_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponentAdds 21 frames of advantage on Punish Counter

dhalsim_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: 4 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

dhalsim_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

dhalsim_jumping_medium_punch.note: Produces a blowback knockdown during a mid-air combo

dhalsim_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

dhalsim_yoga_uppercut_m.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position

dhalsim_yoga_lance_h.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent on counter or Punish Counter

dhalsim_yoga_mountain_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent on counter or Punish Counter

dhalsim_karma_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

dhalsim_yoga_mummy.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

dhalsim_long_sliding_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

dhalsim_l_yoga_fire_l.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↘→ + LP

dhalsim_l_yoga_fire_charged.note: Hold the button for 29 frames and the held button version will be performed automatically

dhalsim_m_yoga_fire_m.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↘→ + MP

dhalsim_m_yoga_fire_charged.note: Hold the button for 29 frames and the held button version will be performed automatically

dhalsim_h_yoga_fire_h.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↘→ + HP

dhalsim_h_yoga_fire_charged.note: Hold the button for 29 frames and the held button version will be performed automatically

dhalsim_od_yoga_flame.note: Recovery is reduced by 5 frame on hit

dhalsim_yoga_float_immediately.note: Considered airborne from frame 13Can perform moves from frame 30

dhalsim_yoga_float_forward.note: Considered airborne on frame 13Can perform moves from frame 30

dhalsim_p_aerial_yoga_teleport_forward.note: Completely invincible from frames 10 - 15Can perform moves from frame 30

dhalsim_k_aerial_yoga_teleport_forward.note: Completely invincible from frames 10 - 15Can perform moves from frame 30

dhalsim_p_aerial_yoga_teleport_backward.note: Completely invincible from frames 10 - 15Can perform moves from frame 35

dhalsim_k_aerial_yoga_teleport_backward.note: Completely invincible from frames 10 - 15Can perform moves from frame 35

dhalsim_sa1_l_yoga_inferno_l.note: Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 11Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterDeals 792 of recoverable damage on block

dhalsim_sa1_m_yoga_inferno_m.note: Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 11Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterDeals 792 of recoverable damage on block

dhalsim_sa1_h_yoga_inferno_h.note: Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 11Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterDeals 792 of recoverable damage on block

dhalsim_sa2_yoga_sunburst_lv1.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterLevel 1 activates if the button is released within 139 frames

dhalsim_sa2_yoga_sunburst_lv2.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterHold the button for over 140 frames to activate the Level 2 version

dhalsim_sa2_yoga_sunburst_lv3.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterHold the button for over 188 frames to activate the Level 2 version

dhalsim_sa3_merciless_yoga.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
dhalsim_sa3_merciless_yoga.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
dhalsim_sa3_merciless_yoga.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 14Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

dhalsim_ca_merciless_yoga.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
dhalsim_ca_merciless_yoga.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
dhalsim_ca_merciless_yoga.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 14Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

dhalsim_yoga_smash.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

dhalsim_yoga_throw.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

dhalsim_yoga_splash.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

dhalsim_backward_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

dhalsim_drive_impact_yoga_rise.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

dhalsim_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
dhalsim_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
dhalsim_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 226 frames of recovery added on hit

dhalsim_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 206 frames of recovery added on hit

dhalsim_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
dhalsim_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
dhalsim_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

dhalsim_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

dhalsim_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

dhalsim_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

dhalsim_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
dhalsim_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
dhalsim_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
